item.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
item.description: Focus: NVIDIA has a new AI-related update around 'Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
item.description: Focus: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

item.title: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
item.description: Focus: Benchmark has a new release or product update around 'Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World', pointing to changes in model capability, developer tooling or AI adoption.

item.title: Why the Frontier Ecosystem must be Open — Matei Zaharia and Reynold Xin, Databricks
item.description: Focus: In a rare double-interview, the Databricks technical leaders riff on what it will take for every company to build Agent Clouds

item.title: NVIDIA and AWS Collaborate to Bring AI to Production at Scale
item.description: Focus: Building AI systems at scale is demanding, requiring low-latency inference, fast vector search, strong GPU price-performance and infrastructure that can grow without multiplying operational complexity. NVIDIA’s latest work with Amazon Web Services (AWS) addresses each of those constraints. Ac

item.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
item.description: Focus: Google DeepMind Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: GLM 5.2: why I’m replacing Opus in Claude Code with this new model
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'GLM 5.2: why I’m replacing Opus in Claude Code with this new model', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: [AINews] Claude Tag: Multiplayer, Proactive, Persistent Agents in Slack
item.description: Focus: Claude finally gets a Slackbot upgrade

item.title: GLM 5.2 Fast via Wafer now available on AI Gateway
item.description: Focus: GLM 5.2 Fast via Wafer is now available on AI Gateway . Based on our own benchmarking across small-context, large-context, and tool-call scenarios, Wafer delivers a 2x higher throughput than other providers serving GLM-5.2 on serverless, leading on decode and end-to-end speed for sustained ge

item.title: Chat SDK adds Kapso support
item.description: Focus: Chat SDK now supports Kapso with the new vendor-official adapter . Kapso connects your bot to WhatsApp through its hosted platform, handling the WhatsApp Business setup, credentials, and webhooks so you can focus on your bot's logic. Replies use the standard Chat SDK thread and message APIs,

item.title: Chat SDK adds Novu support
item.description: Focus: Chat SDK now supports Novu with the new vendor-official adapter . One handler set puts your agent on Slack, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, and email. Novu handles credentials, identity, and delivery, keeping OAuth and tokens outside your app and mapping each channel to one user. Your ag

item.title: Chat SDK adds Sendblue support
item.description: Focus: Chat SDK now supports Sendblue with the new vendor-official adapter . Build bots that send and receive iMessage, SMS, and RCS through Sendblue's hosted gateway, reaching people on the messaging apps they already use. Messages use iMessage-first delivery with support for automatic SMS and RCS

item.title: Talos: Scaling rare disease diagnosis with automated, iterative genomic reanalysis
item.description: Focus: Talos was built to help resolve a major bottleneck in genomic medicine: human review time. The open-source system recovered 90% of in-scope diagnoses while surfacing just 1.3 candidate variants per patient for expert review. The post Talos: Scaling rare disease diagnosis with automated, itera
